text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse 
CODEBOOK: Medicare Part D Plan Characteristics (2007-2014) │ October 2021 │ V 1.4 386 

PRE_ICL_MONPP_COPAY_3M 

LABEL: Pre-ICL Mail Order Non-Preferred Pharmacy Copay for 3-month supply 

DESCRIPTION: This variable identifies the beneficiary copay amount for a 3-month supply of the drugs on this tier, 
using mail order non-preferred pharmacy (MONPP; also known as a standard mail order pharmacy 
within a split network) during the pre-initial coverage limit (ICL)
